channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Body of Iran’s Khamenei arrives in Iraq before procession
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The body of Iran’s Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei has arrived in Iraq for funeral processions in Shia holy cities. Learn more about the ceremonies.
Read More: https://punchng.com/body-of-irans-khamenei-arrives-in-iraq-before-procession/

item.title: UTM FLNG secures 15-year gas supply deal
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
UTM FLNG has secured a 15-year gas supply deal, a major step for Nigeria’s first indigenous floating LNG project. This agreement unlocks financing and boos
Read More: https://punchng.com/utm-flng-secures-15-year-gas-supply-deal/

item.title: Messi saves Argentina in dramatic win over Egypt
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Lionel Messi scored in a record sixth straight World Cup knockout match to help Argentina reach the quarterfinals with a stunning late comeback to beat Egypt 3-2 in Atlanta.

item.title: Belgium's Onana out of WC with ACL injury
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Belgium midfielder Amadou Onana has been ruled out of the World Cup after suffering an anterior cruciate ligament injury, the Red Devils have confirmed.

item.title: Belgium say beating U.S. 'justice' after ban U-tur...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Belgium midfielder Nicolas Raskin said "there's always justice somewhere in life" after beating a U.S. team controversially featuring Folarin Balogun,

item.title: U.S. loss sets record as most-watched soccer game
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: The United States game against Belgium in the round of 16 at the FIFA World Cup set another record as the most-watched soccer telecast in U.S. history, Fox said after preliminary ratings came out Tuesday.

item.title: Paraguayan senator demands apology from Mbappé
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: The Paraguayan senator embroiled in a racism row with Kylian Mbappé has demanded an apology from the France forward and threatened legal action against him for "gender-based violence."

item.title: ⚽Bellingham, Yamal, Messi unveil WC final ball
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: In a move that is in no way tempting fate, Lionel Messi, Jude Bellingham and Lamine Yamal have all posed with the new-look World Cup final match ball.

item.title: Galaxy send Pec to Cruzeiro for club-record fee
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: The LA Galaxy sent attacker Gabriel Pec to Brazilian side Cruzeiro for a club-record fee, the MLS side announced Tuesday.

item.title: Pulisic forced off injured for USMNT vs. Belgium
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Christian Pulisic was forced off with an ankle injury in the second half of the United States' World Cup round of 16 loss against Belgium.

item.title: Gotham FC, NYCFC to share new Queens stadium
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Gotham FC will play home games at Etihad Park in Queens, New York, beginning in 2028, putting the reigning NWSL champions inside New York City limits for the first time.

item.title: Argentina, Messi complete epic comeback vs. Egypt,...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Argentina left it late again to muscle their way past Egypt in a game that had everything: VAR drama, Messi magic, underdog brilliance and another unforgettable World Cup moment.

item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Focus is more on parents' ability to pay for travel matches than on young player development

item.title: Xenophobia: Fourth evacuation flight due Wednesday
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The Federal Government has announced that the fourth evacuation flight conveying 270 Nigerians from South Africa is expected to arrive at the Murtala Muhammed International Airport, Lagos, by 5:00 a.m. on Wednesday. item.title: Trump calls Nicki Minaj ‘so hot’ during White House luncheon
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: The US President’s remarks have sparked debate online. The post Trump calls Nicki Minaj ‘so hot’ during White House luncheon appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.

item.title: Ghana Cancels Presidential Meeting With South Africa Over Continued Xenophobic Attacks
item.dc:creator: Information Nigeria
item.description: Ghana on Tuesday said a visit between President John Mahama and counterpart Cyril Ramaphosa had been postponed amid anti-immigrant violence in South Africa. Accra and Pretoria have been at diplomatic loggerheads over a wave of protests, some of them violent, against foreigners in South Africa, where

item.title: WAFU B U-20 Tourney: Musa boosts Flying Eagles with cash gift
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Former Super Eagles captain Ahmed Musa has gifted the Flying Eagles N2 million to boost the morale of the players ahead of the WAFU B U-20 Championship, DAILY POST reports. Musa presented the cash gift to the Flying Eagles through the team’s coordinator, Abubakar Abubakar. The former Leicester

item.title: Africa: Africa Has Faced a Rare Ebola Outbreak for Months. Here's What to Know.
item.dc:creator: AllAfrica
item.description: [CFR] The rapid spread of a rare Ebola strain through Central and East Africa is testing local public health authorities and raising concerns about the state of global health security.

item.description: Neymar’s father has pleaded with his son to continue playing football despite Brazil’s shock exit from the FIFA 2026 World read more Neymar’s father begs son not to quit football after World Cup heartbreak

item.title: Dangote To Build 700,000bpd Refinery In Kenya
item.dc:creator: Information Nigeria
item.description: A 700,000-bpd east African oil refinery proposed by Africa’s richest man, Aliko Dangote, will be built in Kenya, a senior company official said Tuesday, putting a lid on speculation over the location of the mega-project. The massive refinery — similar to Dangote’s sprawling complex in Nigeria — will

item.title: Explore Nigeria’s Diversity, Tourism Potential, Oluremi Tinubu Urges Nigerians
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: First Lady Oluremi Tinubu has urged Nigerians, particularly young people, to embrace the country’s diversity and harness its vast tourism potential as a catalyst for economic growth and job creation. She made the call on Tuesday while receiving the Ambassador of the State of Qatar to Nigeria,

item.title: Nigeria’s Three Young STEM Stars Win Gold at the 2026 International STEM Olympiad in Rome
item.dc:creator: BellaNaija
item.description: Nigerian students Chimdiebube Onwubiko, Don Anele Munachimso Marvelous, and Egejurum Onyedikachi Ethan have won gold at the 2026 International STEM Olympiad in Rome, competing against students from 154 countries. Following the match between France and Paraguay, Amarilla ignited controversy by posting racial slurs directed at Mbappe on social media. In retaliat

item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: Peller and his friend, Bello Oladipo, appeared before the court in connection with an incident that occurred on 2 July. The post Court grants Peller bail in case involving Lagos State Police appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.

item.title: Kwara: Abducted worshippers regain freedom after 105 days in captivity
item.dc:creator: Daily Trust
item.description: Three abducted female worshippers who were among those kidnapped during the March 22 attack on ECWA Church, Omugo, in Ifelodun Local Government Area of Kwara State have regained their freedom. This is after spending 105 days in captivity. They were said to have been rescued by a joint team of securi

item.title: Prince Harry Criticizes British Court Ruling After Lawsuit Against Tabloid Dismissed
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Prince Harry, the Duke of Sussex, has strongly criticised a British High Court decision after a judge dismissed a major privacy lawsuit he and six other prominent figures brought against Associated Newspapers Limited (ANL).     The ruling, delivered by Mr Justice Nicklin following a 46-day

item.title: Editorial: Nigeria cannot afford another flood disaster
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Flooding in Nigeria is no longer a natural disaster alone; it is increasingly a failure of governance, urban planning and public responsibility. Every year, drains remain blocked by refuse, buildings continue to spring up on waterways, wetlands are encroached upon, and emergency responses arrive onl

item.title: 2027: “Obi Can’t Face Me, Let Alone Tinubu” — Umahi
item.dc:creator: Information Nigeria
item.description: The minister of works, David Umahi, on Tuesday dismissed suggestions that Peter Obi poses a political threat to President Bola Ahmed Tinubu, saying the former Anambra State governor ‘can’t even face’ him, let alone the president, as political manoeuvring ahead of the 2027 elections gathers pace. Uma

item.dc:creator: ICIR Nigeria
item.description: PRESIDENT Bola Tinubu has directed the Independent Corrupt Practices and Other Related Offences Commission (ICPC) to probe the ‘phantom’ Presidential Foreign Intervention Promotion Council (PFIPC), headed by Adeniyi Adeyemi. In a statement by the Special Adviser to the President on Infor

item.title: NYC Is Racing to Secure ‘Unstable’ Midtown Manhattan Building
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: New York City officials were racing to stabilize a high-rise building in the heart of Manhattan after cracks developed in multiple columns and floors began to sag, leading to the evacuation of nearby office buildings and a school during the height of the morning rush. (Source: Bloomberg)

item.title: England hand abject India their biggest T20I defeat to take 2-0 series lead
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: England handed an abject India their record defeat in T20 internationals as they won the third T20I at Trent Bridge by 125 runs to storm into a 2-0 series lead.

item.title: Police confirm killing of 19-year-old in Osun, suspect cult attack
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Osun State Police Command on Tuesday confirmed the killing of a 19-year-old, Timileyin Oni, in Ijebu-Jesa by yet-to-be-identified individuals. The command also said three people were injured and hospitalised in the incident that claimed Oni’s life. The command’s Public Relations Offi

item.title: Discord admits AI moderation bug wrongfully banned users over harmless images
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch
item.description: The company confirmed that the issue had been affecting accounts since May, with an additional 200 users banned over the weekend before its team identified and fixed the problem.

item.title: Adobe’s stock is temptingly cheap. Should investors bite?
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: Adobe has become a polarizing stock in the face of questions about its AI future.

item.title: Woman suspected of Monaco bombing is found dead in Ukraine, authorities say
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: The woman suspected of trying to kill a Ukrainian business tycoon in a bombing attack in Monaco last week was found dead in Ukraine with gunshot wounds to the head, Ukraine’s Security Service said on Tuesday. FRANCE 24's Morgan Ayre reports.

item.title: Messi scores 21st World Cup goal, extends scoring run
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Lionel Messi scores his 21st World Cup goal, extending his record-breaking scoring run to nine consecutive matches in Argentina’s dramatic win.

item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Senator Adams Oshiomhole has called on the Federal Government to seize the profits of South African companies operating in Nigeria and use the funds to compensate Nigerians affected by previous xenophobic attacks in South Africa. The remarks were made in a video in which Oshiomhole reacted to what h

item.description: The President directed that the investigation be concluded and a comprehensive report submitted to him within 30 days. The post PFIPC: Tinubu orders ICPC to investigate Adeniyi within 30 days appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.dc:creator: Information Nigeria
item.description: The Senate on Tuesday rejected calls to nationalise South African-owned businesses, including MTN and DStv, in retaliation for the ongoing xenophobic attacks on Nigerians, even as it strongly condemned the violence and urged the Federal Government to intensify diplomatic efforts to protect Nigerians

item.title: France's Le Pen says still running for president, despite embezzlement conviction confirmed
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: French far-right chief Marine Le Pen Tuesday said she was still standing for president next year, after an appeals court confirmed her embezzlement conviction but paved the way for her to run with a shorter ban from office. FRANCE 24's Mark Owen speaks with Dr Katy Brown, Fellow in Language and Soci

Following his resignation from the party, Arapaja met with the Oyo State All Progressives Congress, APC governorship candidate, Sharafadeen Alli ahead of

item.title: El-Rufai: ADC Demands Review Of Bail Conditions
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) has called for a review of the bail conditions granted former governor of Kaduna State, Mallam Nasir El-Rufai. Justice Joyce Abdulmalike of Federal High Court, Abuja had granted the former governor bail in the sum of N100 million with one surety in like sum. The

item.title: Argentina come from two down to beat Egypt in World Cup classic
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Argentina produced an astonishing comeback to keep their World Cup alive as they recovered from two down to beat Egypt 3-2 in stoppage-time.

item.title: Fifa investigating alleged racist abuse of IShowSpeed
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Fifa has opened an investigation following allegations of racist abuse involving American social media influencer IShowSpeed and a supporter during Argentina's 3-2 win over Cape Verde on Friday.

item.title: Argentina make incredible late comeback to beat Egypt
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Argentina survive an almighty scare before delivering a scarcely believable second-half comeback to break Egypt hearts and reach the quarter-finals of the 2026 World Cup.

item.title: Tinubu orders ICPC to probe fake Presidential Council, gives 30-day deadline
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: President Tinubu directed the ICPC to investigate allegations surrounding the use of forged appointment letters and other government documents, as well as claims that the alleged fake presidential appointment was used to seek official recognition, diplomatic support and visa facilitation.

item.title: Monaco bombing suspect found dead in Ukraine
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The body of 39-year-old Anastasia Berezovskaya, a Ukrainian national wanted by authorities in Monaco concerning the recent bombing, has been found dead near Kyiv in Ukraine with gunshot wounds to the head. The June 29 blast targeted Ukrainian business tycoon Vadym Yermolayev, injuring him, his partn

item.title: World Cup: Messi inspires Argentina comeback against Egypt, seal quarter-final berth
item.dc:creator: BusinessDay
item.description: Reigning world champions Argentina produced a remarkable comeback from two goals down to avoid a shock FIFA 2026 World Cup read more World Cup: Messi inspires Argentina comeback against Egypt, seal quarter-final berth

item.title: World Cup: Argentina Rally from Behind to Eliminate Egypt
item.dc:creator: Daily Trust
item.description: Argentina came from two goals down to defeat Egypt 3-2 in their 2026 FIFA World Cup round of 16 encounter at the Atlanta stadium. Enzo Fernandez scored the winning goal in added time to break Egyptian hearts in a drama-filled match that saw Yasser Ibrahim and Mostafa Zico give Egypt a two-goal lead

item.title: Reps Summons Accountant General, Issue Final Warning
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The House of Representatives Public Accounts Committee (PAC) has warned the Accountant-General of the Federation (AGF), Mr. Shamseldeen Ogunjimi from constantly ignoring it’s invitations. The Committee, chaired by Bamidele Salam, issued what it described as a final invitation to the Accountant

item.title: Senate queries N943m allowances, delayed appointments at North West Commission
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: THE Senate has raised the alarm over the operations of the North West Development Commission (NWDC), especially with regard to the delay in appointing executive directors, alleged internal divisions, and the spending of about N943 million on board allowances. The post Senate queries N943m allowances

item.title: ‘I Have Cancer,’ Nollywood Actress Cynthia Anijekwu Cries, Calls For Support
item.dc:creator: Information Nigeria
item.description: Nollywood actress Cynthia Anijekwu has made an emotional appeal to Nigerians for financial assistance after revealing that she is battling cancer for the second time. In a video circulating on social media on Tuesday, the actress disclosed that she was first diagnosed with cancer in 2023, when she u

item.title: FULL LIST: Every Team Lionel Messi Has Eliminated At The FIFA World Cup
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: Lionel Messi has added another remarkable chapter to his legendary FIFA World Cup career. The post FULL LIST: Every Team Lionel Messi Has Eliminated At The FIFA World Cup appeared first on Trending News.

item.title: World Cup 2026: Brilliant Comeback –Keane Hails Argentina’s Victory Against Egypt
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Manchester United legend Roy Keane has described Argentina’s dramatic 3-2 comeback win against Egypt at the FIFA World Cup 2026 round of 16 as an absolutely amazing thriller. The holders looked down and out when goals from Yasser Ibrahim and Mostafa Ziko, either side of Messi having a penalty

item.title: US Revokes Waiver Allowing Iran Oil Sales After Attacks
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: The US Treasury Department revoked a waiver that allowed the sale of Iranian oil in response to attacks on tankers in the Strait of Hormuz, jeopardizing an interim peace deal between Washington and Tehran.

item.title: Nollywood Actress Cynthia Anijekwu Appeals for Public Support for Cancer Treatment
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Nollywood actress Cynthia Anijekwu has publicly appealed to Nigerians for financial assistance to support her ongoing medical battle against cancer.   In a video shared on social media on Tuesday, the actress revealed that she is facing a second diagnosis after initially undergoing surgery and

item.title: Senate questions NWDC over N943m board allowances, governance gaps, delayed appointments
item.dc:creator: Ripples Nigeria
item.description: The Senate Committee on Regional Development on Tuesday subjected the North West Development Commission (NWDC) to intense scrutiny over its governance structure, financial management and operational performance, raising concerns over the absence of executive directors and the payment of about N943 m

item.title: Flutterwave secures Circle Ventures investment, launches USDC settlement
item.dc:creator: Nairametrics
item.description: Nigerian fintech giant, Flutterwave has secured a strategic investment from Circle Ventures and introduced support for USD Coin (USDC) settlement across its payments platform. The post Flutterwave secures Circle Ventures investment, launches USDC settlement appeared first on Nairametrics.

item.title: Elon Musk’s Terafab could give a major boost to this corner of the chip sector
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: SpaceX could spend about $135 billion on wafer-fab equipment over the next five years, UBS said.

item.title: ICPC confirms arrest of El-Rufai’s personal doctor, gives reasons
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: ICPC said this arrest of the medical doctor followed developments surrounding a court-approved medical visit granted to El-Rufai, who was expected to be at the Kaduna State High Court between July 6, 7, and 8, 2026, for an accelerated hearing of the criminal charges pending against him.

item.title: Tinubu Orders ICPC To Probe PFIPC, Forged Appointment Claims
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: The President ordered that the investigation be concluded and a detailed report submitted to him within 30 days. The post Tinubu Orders ICPC To Probe PFIPC, Forged Appointment Claims appeared first on Channels Television.

item.title: ADC demands unrestricted access to El-Rufai
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) has expressed shock over reports that officials of the Independent Corrupt Practices and Other Related The post ADC demands unrestricted access to El-Rufai appeared first on Tribune Online.
